title: bursera yaterensis
intro: Bursera yaterensis, also known as Copalillo, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central America. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bursera yaterensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Bursera yaterensis can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its resin is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
